entry.title: A Sample Paper on Gradient Methods
entry.summary: We present a sample paper used as an integration-test fixture. arXiv renders it as native HTML, so fetch converts that HTML to markdown.

entry.title: Another Sample Paper With No Markdown Available
entry.summary: A second fixture paper with no arxiv HTML and a PDF-only e-print endpoint, so neither conversion path yields markdown.

entry.title: A Third Sample Paper With LaTeX Source Only
entry.summary: A third fixture paper with no arxiv HTML but a LaTeX e-print archive, exercising fetch's LaTeX-to-markdown fallback path.

entry.title: A Fourth Sample Paper With No Representation At All
entry.summary: A fourth fixture paper with no arxiv HTML, no e-print source, and no PDF -- every conversion path 404s, so it is the one paper that ends up with no rendered body.

entry.title: An Old Paper Revised Years Later
entry.summary: A revision of a paper first announced in 2020. The API id carries v3; fetcher mirrors only first versions, so this must be dropped.

entry.title: A Cross-Listed Paper Whose Primary Lives Elsewhere
entry.summary: A fixture paper whose primary category (math.OC) is outside the tracked set; it appears in the query results via its cs.LG cross-list and must be dropped.
